policy.note: This scout records current innovation candidates and guarded next actions. It does not install, clone, ingest or run private data.

candidates.name: Microsoft MarkItDown
candidates.fit: Convert common office/web/document formats into Markdown for later LLM-safe processing.
candidates.risk: Architecture books and PDFs may contain copyrighted text; only use fixtures until Source Root and rights rules are explicit.

candidates.name: Docling
candidates.fit: Structured PDF/DOCX/PPTX/image/HTML conversion with layout-aware outputs for later KosmoReferences ingestion.
candidates.risk: High value for scanned architecture sources, but must stay fixture-only before private library unlock.

candidates.name: DeepSeek-OCR / DeepSeek-OCR2
candidates.fit: Local OCR research line for scans, drawings and mixed document pages.
candidates.risk: OCR can hallucinate plausible text; outputs need provenance, confidence and human review before training.

candidates.name: Qwen3 Embedding and Reranker
candidates.fit: Multilingual embedding and reranking foundation for KosmoReferences/KosmoAsset retrieval.
candidates.risk: Do not embed private library content until Source Root, rights scope and deletion/export rules are active.

candidates.name: Qwen3-VL Embedding
candidates.fit: Future image/screenshot/video retrieval path for plans, facades, material photos and rendered assets.
candidates.risk: Visual retrieval over private scans and photos must be deletion-safe and never exported unchecked.

candidates.name: IfcOpenShell
candidates.fit: IFC parsing, geometry and BIM metadata bridge for future reference-to-asset and structural analysis workflows.
candidates.risk: Geometry imports can expose private project structure; use generated/public IFC fixtures first.

candidates.name: TopologicPy
candidates.fit: Spatial topology, graphs and semantic 3D reasoning for architectural analysis and future Kosmo specialist training.
candidates.risk: Keep graph fixtures synthetic/public until private reference provenance is settled.

candidates.name: Speckle
candidates.fit: AEC data hub/connectors pattern for exchanging design data across tools without locking Kosmo into one authoring app.
candidates.risk: Cloud/data sharing must stay disabled until project privacy and account boundaries are explicit.

candidates.name: Paper2Poster
candidates.fit: Multi-agent layout and evaluation ideas for KosmoPublish reference sheets, posters and architecture project summaries.
candidates.risk: Use as process inspiration; do not feed private papers/books into external publishing flows.

recommended_sequence.action: Create public/synthetic fixture contracts for Docling, IfcOpenShell and Qwen retrieval before installing anything.
Wait for explicit Source Root and owner/risk gates before applying OCR, embeddings or conversion to private libraries.
Expose selected innovation candidates in Orbit as roadmap items, not active tools.
